title: OST Node Schema
description: Schema for Opportunity Solution Tree nodes stored in git.

id.description: Stable unique ID. Format: opp_xxx, sol_xxx, exp_xxx, out_xxx

parent_id.description: ID of the parent node. Null for outcome (root).

title.description: Short statement in customer language for opportunities; metric for outcomes; action for solutions.

ref.description: URL or file path to the source artifact

n_signals.description: Total number of evidence items. Minimum 5 required before promoting to 'tested'.

last_touched.description: ISO date of last update. Nodes not touched in 30 days are candidates for archival.
